segments.text: Thank you for calling.
Our office is currently closed for the day and will reopen at 7 a.m.
If this is a medical emergency, please hang up and dial 911.
You are speaking with Sarah, a virtual assistant on a recorded line.
Our normal office hours are Monday through Friday from 7 a.m. to 5 p.m.
with our phones open from 8 a.m. to 4 30 p.m.
How can I help you today?
Fill my prescription.
Okay, I can put in a request for a prescription refill.
Please note that requests submitted after hours will not be reviewed until the
next business day and can take up to two business days to process. Do you wish to
continue? Yes. Are you requesting a prescription refill for yourself or for
someone else? Myself. Can I get your first name please? I want to make sure I
have your information correct. Can you please tell me your first name and
what is your last name? Just to confirm your last name is spelled
that correct? No. Can you please spell your last name for me? Thank you for
spelling that. So your last name is that correct? No. I apologize for the confusion.
Could you please spell your last name one more time slowly? Thank you. I have your
last name correct? Yes. Perfect. What is your date of birth? 37 1990. Just to
confirm your date of birth is March 7th 1990. Is that correct? Yeah. Who is your
primary care provider? Samantha. Thank you. I do not see a provider named Samantha.
Could you please provide the last name of your provider or let me know if you
would like to choose from the following providers Nathan Gene, Heather Moore,
Nicholas Coppins, Hannah Stutz, Caitlin Devlin, Cassidy Abrahamson, or Thea
Thank you for clarifying. I do not have a provider named Samantha listed.
Would you like to select from the following providers?
Nathan Jean, Heather Mohr, Nicholas Coppins, Hannah Stutz,
Caitlin Devlin, Cassidy Abrahamson, or Thea Murphy?
Or if you are unsure, I can have the team check your primary care provider on file.
Which would you prefer?
Check my primary care on file.
Thank you.
Please list all the names of the medications you would like refilled.
Adderall 30 milligrams.
Got it.
Can I get the dosage instructions for Adderall?
For example, how many times per day do you take it?
30 milligrams once a day.
Thank you.
What is the name and location of your pharmacy?
Walgreens Kidney Name.
What is a good time to call you back during business hours if we have any questions?
Anytime.
time. Best number for the callback. Yeah. Yeah. Thank you. I have submitted your prescription
refill request. It will be reviewed on the next business day. Is there anything else
I can help you with today?
